case_title: WILLIAM JEFFREY VS PATEL G.B. DBA GRAYSTONE HOTEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAM JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL G.B.  DBA GRAYSTONE HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
